arts.ttl: Player being pushed towards Tottenham – Offered to Spurs, club fancy the money
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are in the picture to sign AC Milan’s Noah Okafor in the winter market, according to reports from Italy. The forward has managed a goal and two assists from 17 games in all competitions this season. Milan came close to sending him to RB Leipzig earlier in this window. Arsenal, Chelsea, Man Utd and Spurs look at Tel as Villa expect Watkins bid
arts.sum: Arsenal, Chelsea, Manchester United and Tottenham are among the clubs interested in Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel.

arts.ttl: “He wants to leave” – Tottenham now in talks with club and agents as exit being accepted
arts.sum: On Wednesday, we covered claims from Germany which stated Tottenham Hotspur are in talks with Mathys Tel’s representatives over a potential transfer in the winter market. The striker is unhappy with the lack of regular minutes at Bayern Munich and is looking to join a club where he can play regularly.
